title: Eli Lilly Acquires Three Vaccine Biotechs for ~$3.8B
headline: Eli Lilly announces agreements to acquire Curevo Inc., LimmaTech Biologics AG, and Vaccine Company Inc. in deals valued at up to approximately $3.8 billion combined, expanding into infectious disease and vaccines including shingles and Epstein-Barr virus.
key_facts: Total deal value: up to ~$3.8B (described as 'nearly $4 billion' by CNBC); Announced May 26, 2026; Targets include shingles and Epstein-Barr virus vaccines; Lilly hired veteran vaccine regulator Peter Marks (former FDA) preceding the deal

title: Verve VERVE-102 Gene-Editing Data Affirms Lilly Investment
headline: Verve Therapeutics' Phase 1b data for heart gene-editing drug VERVE-102 show PCSK9 reduced by 88% and LDL-cholesterol reduced by 62%, validating Lilly's billion-dollar investment.
key_facts: PCSK9 reduction: 88%; LDL-cholesterol reduction: 62%; Phase 1b data; Lilly billion-dollar investment in Verve

title: Gilead Hepatitis D Drug Wins FDA Approval
headline: Gilead Sciences receives FDA approval for its hepatitis D medication on May 26, 2026, after a previous rejection, expanding treatment options for this rare liver disease.
key_facts: FDA approval date: May 26, 2026; Drug previously rejected by FDA; Gilead stock (GILD) at $133.73, down 0.47% on day, up 8.95% YTD

title: Lantheus Considers ~$7B Curium Buyout Proposal
headline: Lantheus Holdings is considering a potential $7 billion buyout proposal from Curium, a radiopharmaceuticals company, potentially creating a radiopharmaceutical powerhouse.
key_facts: Deal value: ~$7 billion; Status: considering proposal; Radiopharmaceuticals sector

title: U.S. Pushes to Add Biotech to COINS Act Restrictions
headline: Growing U.S. pressure to add biotechnology to the COINS Act threatens to restrict outbound capital flows to Chinese biotech, with BMS-Hengrui's $15.2 billion deal as the primary flashpoint.
key_facts: BMS-Hengrui deal: $15.2 billion covering 12+ early-stage drugs; GOP chairman of China panel called out the BMS deal; Threatens broader China-to-U.S. licensing pipeline

title: ASCO 2026 Data Previews Show Oncology Advances
headline: BioPharma Dive publishes five data snapshots ahead of ASCO 2026, including survival benefit data in BRAFV600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer and Relay Therapeutics early data vs. Novartis' Vijoice.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 meeting preview; BRAFV600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer survival benefit data; Relay Therapeutics drug vs. Novartis Vijoice comparison

title: Outlook Therapeutics Claims FDA Will Approve Avastin Biosimilar
headline: Outlook Therapeutics, after receiving three Complete Response Letters from FDA, claims the agency will approve its bevacizumab (Avastin) biosimilar for wet age-related macular degeneration.
key_facts: Three Complete Response Letters previously received; Drug: bevacizumab biosimilar for wet AMD; Claims FDA approval forthcoming

title: Kardigan Nasdaq IPO Backs Three Cardiovascular Drugs
headline: Kardigan prepares Nasdaq IPO to support development of three cardiovascular drugs.
key_facts: Kardigan Nasdaq IPO readying; Three cardiovascular drugs in pipeline

title: Niowave Builds $75M Radioisotope Production Plant
headline: Niowave starts construction of a $75 million radioisotope production facility.
key_facts: Niowave radioisotope production plant; Investment: $75 million

title: AbbVie Trims Allergan Workforce by 85
headline: AbbVie reduces Allergan workforce by 85 employees as part of cost management strategy.
key_facts: Allergan workforce reduction: 85 employees; Announced May 22, 2026

title: Astellas Eyes More Cost Cuts and Five-Year Plan
headline: Astellas announces additional cost-cutting measures and outlines a five-year strategic plan.
key_facts: Astellas cost reduction initiative; Five-year strategic plan

title: FDA Panel to Debate Moderna Vaccine
headline: FDA panel scheduled to debate Moderna vaccine candidate.

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Deepens Anthropic AI Partnership
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb expands AI investment through deepened partnership with Anthropic.
key_facts: BMS-Anthropic AI deal; AI investment deepening
